title: equisetum ramosissimum var. japonicum
intro: Equisetum ramosissimum var. japonicum, also known as Japanese horsetail, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Equisetum ramosissimum var. japonicum include treating urinary tract infections, reducing edema, and improving kidney function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
